arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool entertain Real Madrid at Anfield in the Champions League tonight with the hope of extending their stay at the top of the table. The Reds are the only team to have collected maximum points after four games, while Real Madrid languish in 18th position after a mixed start. arts.ttl: Liverpool and Real Madrid to discuss Trent Alexander-Arnold move over lunch ahead of Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool and Real Madrid directors will have lunch on Merseyside ahead of their clash in the Champions League, and while that is fairly standard procedure for the suits in Spain, the topic of their meeting will not be. The latest coming out of the Spanish capital is that they will discuss the future of Trent […] The post Liverpool and Real Madrid to discuss Trent Alexander-Arnold move over lunch ahead of Champions League appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Mbappé finds rhythm in preferred position before Madrid visit Liverpool
arts.sum: Frenchman gets another chance to make his mark on the left after ending his mini-scoring drought “The story of my career,” Kylian Mbappé called it, which it wasn’t really and would make his career surprisingly average, but at least he was polite. A little political perhaps, too. After Real Madrid’s 3-0 victory at Leganés on Sunday night, the Frenchman spoke to the club’s TV channel about a game he had started on the left for the first time since his seven-year wait to reach Spain came to a close. He hadscored the opener, ending a four-match run without a goal, 21 shots rattled off without scoring, but his position, he said, was not the reason. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah's dismal record vs Real Madrid as Liverpool star eyes revenge
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is yet to beat Real Madrid in eight career appearances, losing seven and drawing one of his Champions League meetings against the reigning champions

arts.ttl: Liverpool warned Man City crisis could make Anfield trip 'perfect' for Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City have failed to win any of their last six games and now face a daunting trip to Premier League leaders Liverpool on Sunday, having thrown away a three-goal lead against Feyenoord

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid, 2024 Champions League: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Liverpool in what will be a crucial game which could possibly decide the future of the team in this competition. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Camavinga, Modric, Guler, Mbappe, Brahim, Bellingham.
